Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Claims Asserted By Pltf Derrick Crumpler
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTs GINA MEACHAM, JOHN DURSO and LOWE'S HIW, INC.'s Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings On The Claims Asserted By Plaintiff Derrick Crumpler - The motion is granted without leave to amend. Plaintiff's FEHA claims are time barred under California Gov't Code 12960(d). Plaintiff cannot base his claims on Defendant contesting his unemployment benefits application because that conduct does not constitute an adverse employment action. CCP 335.1 bars Plaintiff's common law claims. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)
